Title: Module List - View Installed Modules
Preconditions: Admin logged in with platform admin role
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Modules (or Configuration > Modules)
2. Verify module list loads
3. Check each module shows: name, version, status
4. Count installed modules
Expected Result:
- Module list displays all installed modules
- Each module shows name, version, description
- Status (Active/Inactive) indicated
- No loading errors

Title: Module Settings - Catalog Module
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Catalog module installed
Steps:
1. Open Catalog module settings
2. Review configurable options
3. Modify a non-critical setting
4. Save changes
5. Verify setting persisted
Expected Result:
- Catalog module settings accessible
- Configuration options render correctly
- Changes save without errors
- Settings persist after page refresh
- Restore original setting

Title: Module Settings - Pricing Module
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Pricing module installed
Steps:
1. Open Pricing module settings
2. Review price calculation settings
3. Check currency configuration
4. Verify tax calculation settings
Expected Result:
- Pricing settings accessible
- Currency settings match store config
- Tax calculation mode visible
- Price rounding settings present

Title: Module Settings - Order Module
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Order module installed
Steps:
1. Open Order module settings
2. Review order workflow settings
3. Check order number format
4. Verify notification settings
Expected Result:
- Order settings accessible
- Workflow states visible
- Order number format configurable
- Email notification settings present

Title: Module Settings - Payment Module
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Payment module installed
Steps:
1. Open Payment module settings
2. Verify payment gateways configured
3. Check Skyflow/CyberSource/Authorize.Net settings
4. Verify gateway credentials masked
Expected Result:
- Payment settings accessible
- Configured gateways listed
- Credentials are masked (not shown in plain text)
- Gateway status (enabled/disabled) shown
- Test mode indicator present

Title: Cache Management - Clear Cache
Preconditions: Admin logged in with admin permissions
Steps:
1. Navigate to cache management section
2. View current cache status
3. Clear all caches
4. Verify cache cleared
5. Check frontend reflects changes
Expected Result:
- Cache status displayed
- Clear cache action available
- Cache clears successfully
- Confirmation message shown
- Frontend shows fresh data after cache clear

Title: Search Index - Rebuild Index
Preconditions: Admin logged in, search module installed
Steps:
1. Navigate to search index management
2. Check current index status
3. Trigger full reindex
4. Monitor reindex progress
5. Verify search works after reindex
Expected Result:
- Index status shows last rebuild time
- Reindex starts successfully
- Progress indicator shown
- Reindex completes without errors
- Search returns updated results after rebuild

Title: Notification Settings - Email Configuration
Preconditions: Admin logged in, notification module installed
Steps:
1. Navigate to notification settings
2. Review SMTP/email configuration
3. Check notification templates
4. Verify email template rendering
Expected Result:
- Email settings accessible
- SMTP configuration shown (server, port, credentials masked)
- Notification templates listed
- Template preview/edit available

Title: Background Jobs - Job Status
Preconditions: Admin logged in, background jobs configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to background jobs section
2. View recurring jobs list
3. Check job execution history
4. Verify job status indicators
Expected Result:
- Jobs list displays
- Each job shows schedule, last run, status
- Failed jobs highlighted
- Execution history accessible
- Manual trigger option available (if supported)

Title: Data Import - CSV Product Import
Preconditions: Admin logged in, CSV file prepared with product data
Steps:
1. Navigate to Import section
2. Select 'Products' import type
3. Upload CSV file
4. Map columns to product fields
5. Run import
6. Verify products imported
Expected Result:
- Import section accessible
- File upload works
- Column mapping interface functional
- Import processes without fatal errors
- Products appear in catalog
- Import report shows success/failure counts

Title: Data Export - Product Export
Steps:
1. Navigate to Export section
2. Select 'Products' export type
3. Configure export options (format, filters)
4. Run export
5. Download exported file
6. Verify file contents
Expected Result:
- Export section accessible
- Format options available (CSV, JSON)
- Export generates file
- File downloads successfully
- Data is accurate and complete
- Headers/columns match expected format

Title: Platform Settings - General Configuration
Preconditions: Admin logged in with platform admin role
Steps:
1. Navigate to platform-level settings
2. Review general configuration
3. Check security settings
4. Review API settings
5. Verify logging configuration
Expected Result:
- Platform settings accessible
- Security settings (password policy, lockout) visible
- API rate limiting settings present
- Logging level configurable
- Changes save correctly

Title: Theme Settings - Storefront Theme
Steps:
1. Navigate to Content > Themes
2. View installed themes
3. Check active theme
4. Review theme settings/presets
5. Verify theme preset switching
Expected Result:
- Themes section accessible
- Active theme indicated
- Theme presets listed (Default, Coffee)
- Settings are configurable
- Preview shows theme changes

Title: Localization - Language Management
Preconditions: Admin logged in, multiple languages configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to localization settings
2. View configured languages
3. Check default language
4. Verify translation resources
5. Check language-specific content
Expected Result:
- Languages list shows all 13 configured
- Default language indicated
- Translation files/resources accessible
- Language codes correct (en, de, fr, etc.)
- Switching language shows translated admin UI (if supported)

Title: System Health - Diagnostics
Preconditions: Admin logged in with admin permissions
Steps:
1. Navigate to system diagnostics/health section
2. Check platform version info
3. Review module compatibility
4. Check database connection status
5. Verify external service connectivity
Expected Result:
- Platform version displayed
- All modules show compatible status
- Database connection healthy
- External services (search, cache) connected
- No critical health warnings
